title: Multilingual Knowledge Transfer under Data Constraints via Lexical Interventions
title_translated: 受限数据下通过词汇干预实现多语言知识迁移
summary_translated: 在数据资源有限的条件下，本文提出一种基于词汇干预的多语言知识迁移方法。该方法通过在模型训练过程中引入跨语言词汇映射与语义对齐机制，有效缓解了低资源语言中知识表示不足的问题。实验结果表明，该方法在多种跨语言任务中显著提升了模型性能，尤其在小样本场景下表现出更强的泛化能力。

title: Hierarchical Concept Geometry in Language Models Emerges from Word Co-occurrence
comment: 34 pages, 12 figures, including appendices
title_translated: 语言模型中层次化概念几何结构源于词共现
summary_translated: 本研究揭示了语言模型中层次化概念几何结构的生成机制。通过分析词共现模式，发现语义空间中的层级组织并非由显式架构决定，而是自然涌现于词语在大规模文本中频繁共现的统计规律之中。这一发现为理解语言模型内部表征的形成提供了新的理论视角，并支持了‘语义结构源自经验’的观点。

title: Is a Document Educational or Just Wikipedia-Style? -- Pitfalls of Classifier-Based Quality Filtering
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026
title_translated: 文档是教育性的还是仅具维基风格？——基于分类器的质量过滤陷阱
summary_translated: 本文探讨了当前主流文档质量评估方法中存在的系统性偏差问题。研究指出，依赖分类器进行质量筛选时，容易将具有百科全书式风格但缺乏教育深度的内容误判为高质量，从而导致评估结果失真。作者强调需结合内容语义、教学目标与结构特征等多维度指标，以避免此类陷阱，提升质量评估的可靠性。

title: NLG Evaluation: Past, Present, Future
comment: Will appear in Proceeedings of RetroEval 2026
title_translated: 自然语言生成评估：过去、现在与未来
summary_translated: 本文系统回顾了自然语言生成（NLG）评估的发展历程，梳理了从人工评分到自动指标（如BLEU、ROUGE）再到近年来基于预训练模型的评估方法的演进路径。文章分析了现有评估体系的局限性，并展望了未来方向，包括引入人类感知一致性、任务导向评估以及多维度综合评价框架，以实现更全面、可信的NLG质量衡量。

title: A graph-based analysis of semantic types and coercion in contextualized word embeddings
title_translated: 基于图结构的上下文词嵌入中语义类型与强制转换分析
summary_translated: 本文提出一种基于图结构的方法，用于分析上下文词嵌入中语义类型及其强制转换现象。通过构建词语之间的语义关联图，识别出不同语义类别在嵌入空间中的分布模式及动态转换机制。研究发现，强制转换行为在特定语境中高度集中，且与句法结构和上下文语义密切相关，为理解词义消歧与语义泛化提供了新工具。

title: Metadata Predictability Is Not Evidence Dependence: An Intervention-Based Audit for Weak-Label Benchmarks
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Hypothesis Testing
title_translated: 元数据可预测性并非证据依赖性的证据：面向弱标签基准的干预式审计
summary_translated: 本文提出了一种基于干预的审计方法，用于评估弱标签基准中模型行为的可信度。研究发现，元数据的可预测性并不等同于模型对真实证据的依赖，揭示了现有基准在评估模型推理能力时可能存在的偏差。通过系统性干预实验，本文识别出模型在缺乏充分证据的情况下仍能生成高置信度输出的现象，强调了在构建和评估弱标签任务时需谨慎区分表面相关性与真正因果关系。

title: ChartFI: Benchmarking Faithfulness and Insightfulness of Chart Descriptions from Multimodal Large Language Models
title_translated: ChartFI：多模态大语言模型图表描述的忠实性与洞察力基准测试
summary_translated: 本文提出了ChartFI，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型生成图表描述的忠实性与洞察力的综合性基准。该框架通过设计多层次的评估指标，涵盖视觉内容准确性、语义一致性、信息丰富度及对关键趋势的捕捉能力。实验表明，当前主流模型在描述复杂图表时存在显著的过度泛化与事实偏差问题，且对隐含模式的洞察力普遍不足。本研究为提升图表理解系统的可靠性提供了可量化的评估标准。

title: OnePred: Next-Query Prediction via Recursive Intent Memory in Multi-Turn Conversations
title_translated: OnePred：基于递归意图记忆的多轮对话中下一轮查询预测
summary_translated: 本文提出OnePred，一种基于递归意图记忆机制的多轮对话中下一轮查询预测模型。该方法通过构建动态更新的意图记忆库，有效捕捉用户在多轮交互中的潜在意图演化过程。相较于传统序列建模方法，OnePred在多个公开对话数据集上展现出更优的预测准确率与上下文感知能力。实验验证了递归记忆机制在长期对话建模中的有效性，为智能对话系统中的主动预测功能提供了新范式。

title: OpenSkillEval: Automatically Auditing the Open Skill Ecosystem for LLM Agents
title_translated: OpenSkillEval：面向大语言模型智能体开放技能生态的自动化审计
summary_translated: 本文提出OpenSkillEval，一个用于自动评估大语言模型智能体在开放技能生态系统中表现的框架。该系统通过构建标准化的任务执行流程与多维度评估指标，实现对智能体自主学习、任务规划与跨领域技能迁移能力的全面审计。基于大规模实证测试，研究揭示了当前智能体在复杂任务链处理中普遍存在技能碎片化与策略僵化的问题。OpenSkillEval为推动LLM智能体的可解释性与可扩展性发展提供了重要工具。

title: How Human-Like Are Large Language Models? A Register-Aware Linguistic Evaluation Framework
comment: 8.5 pages (main) + 31 pages appendix, 29 figures, 10 tables. Code and data: this https URL
title_translated: 大型语言模型有多像人类？一种注册意识的语言学评估框架
summary_translated: 本文提出一种注册意识的语言学评估框架，用于系统性衡量大型语言模型在语言使用上的类人程度。该框架引入语言注册（register）概念，将语言风格、语域与社会语境纳入评估体系，通过对比模型输出与人类语言在不同语境下的分布特征，量化其语用适切性与语体转换能力。实验结果表明，尽管模型在句法层面表现出高度流畅性，但在深层语境适应与社会语用敏感性方面仍存在明显差距。本研究为评估LLM的自然语言理解与生成能力提供了更具情境敏感性的分析视角。

title: Benchmarking Google Embeddings 2 against Open-Source Models for Multilingual Dense Retrieval and RAG Systems
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Text and evaluation code available at this https URL
title_translated: Google Embeddings 2 与开源模型在多语言密集检索及 RAG 系统中的基准对比
summary_translated: 本研究系统评估了 Google Embeddings 2 在多语言密集检索任务中的性能表现，并将其与多种主流开源嵌入模型进行对比，涵盖跨语言语义匹配、检索准确率及上下文理解能力等关键指标。实验基于多个公开的多语言数据集，验证了 Google Embeddings 2 在复杂语言环境下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。此外，研究进一步探讨其在基于大语言模型的检索增强生成（RAG）系统中的应用潜力，分析了不同嵌入模型对生成质量、检索相关性及推理效率的影响，为实际部署提供了可量化的参考依据。

title: Structure-Guided Entity Resolution: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Robust Name Matching in Complex Linguistic Contexts
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026. 8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables
title_translated: 结构引导的实体消歧：针对复杂语言语境中稳健姓名匹配的大型语言模型微调方法
summary_translated: 针对自然语言中实体名称存在高度同义性、拼写变体及上下文依赖等问题，本文提出一种结构引导的实体消歧框架，通过引入语法结构、语义角色和上下文拓扑信息，指导大型语言模型进行精细化微调。该方法显著提升了在复杂语言场景下（如法律文本、医学记录、历史文献）的姓名匹配准确率，尤其在低资源语言和非标准表达中表现出更强的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，相较于传统嵌入匹配与纯上下文建模方法，所提模型在多个基准数据集上实现了显著性能提升，为高精度实体对齐提供了新的技术路径。

title: Asking For An Old Friend: Diagnosing and Mitigating Temporal Failure Modes in LLM-based Statutory Question Answering
title_translated: 寻找旧友：诊断并缓解基于大语言模型的法规问答系统中的时间失效模式
summary_translated: 本文聚焦于基于大语言模型的法规问答系统中存在的“时间失效”问题，即模型因训练数据的时间局限而无法正确处理时效性法律条文或过时政策。通过构建专门的时间敏感评估基准，系统识别出模型在回答涉及法律修订、废止条款或历史背景的问题时的典型错误模式。研究提出一种基于时间感知提示工程与外部知识校验的双重缓解机制，有效提升模型对时间相关推理的准确性。实验证明，该方法显著降低了因时间偏差导致的误答率，在真实司法问答场景中具备良好的应用前景。

title: ARES: Automated Rubric Synthesis for Scalable LLM Reinforcement Learning
comment: Under Review
title_translated: ARES：面向大规模大语言模型强化学习的自动化评分体系生成方法
summary_translated: 针对大语言模型强化学习中奖励函数设计困难、人工标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出 ARES（Automated Rubric Synthesis），一种自动化生成高质量评分规则的框架。该方法结合领域知识图谱、指令模板演化与自洽性验证机制，从少量示例中自动合成结构化、可扩展的评分标准。ARES 能够支持多样化任务目标的动态适应，显著降低对人工干预的依赖。在多个自然语言生成与对话任务上的实验表明，使用 ARES 生成的奖励信号能有效引导模型收敛至更符合人类价值观的行为策略，且具有良好的泛化能力与可解释性。

title: SSDAU: Structured Semantic Data Augmentation for Joint Entity and Relation Extraction
comment: 12 pages, 3 figure
title_translated: SSDAU：面向联合实体与关系抽取的结构化语义数据增强方法
summary_translated: 为解决联合实体与关系抽取任务中训练数据稀缺与标注噪声问题，本文提出 SSDAU（Structured Semantic Data Augmentation），一种基于结构化语义约束的数据增强框架。该方法通过解析原始文本的句法-语义结构，生成语义保持但形式多样化的合成样本，同时确保新增样本满足预定义的实体类型与关系逻辑一致性。SSDAU 利用对抗性扰动与语义保留约束，在不引入虚假信息的前提下提升模型的泛化能力。在多个公开基准数据集上的实验验证了其有效性，显著改善了模型在低资源场景下的性能，尤其在长尾实体与复杂关系识别方面表现突出。

title: Naturalistic measure of social norms alignment
title_translated: 自然情境下社会规范一致性的度量

title: Articulatory strategy as a source of variation in acoustic vowel dynamics
title_translated: 发音策略作为声学元音动态变异的来源

title: EquiSumm : A Gender Bias-Aware Framework for Inclusive Tweet Summarization
comment: Accepted at AI for Social Good Workshop, Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence (PReMI 2025), IIT Delhi. 6 pages, 2 figures
title_translated: EquiSumm：一种面向性别偏见感知的包容性推文摘要框架

title: Metacognition as Reward: Reinforcing LLM Reasoning via Knowledge and Regulation Signals
title_translated: 元认知即奖励：通过知识与调控信号强化大语言模型推理

title: From Correctness to Preference: A Framework for Personalized Agentic Reinforcement Learning
comment: 34 pages, 7 figures, Under Review
title_translated: 从正确性到偏好：个性化智能体强化学习的框架

title: Cultural Adaptation in Large Language Models for Political Discourse
title_translated: 大型语言模型在政治话语中的文化适应性
summary_translated: 本研究探讨了大型语言模型在处理政治话语时的文化适应机制，分析了不同文化背景下的语义理解与表达差异，旨在提升模型在跨文化政治交流中的准确性与敏感性。通过构建多文化语料库并评估模型在多样化政治语境下的表现，本文揭示了文化因素对模型输出的影响，并提出了改进模型文化适应能力的策略。

title: Emotion Recognition in Sign Language Conversation
title_translated: 手语对话中的情感识别
summary_translated: 本文提出一种基于多模态数据的手语对话情感识别方法，结合视觉动作特征与上下文语境信息，实现对手语中细微情感变化的精准捕捉。研究构建了一个包含多种情感类别标注的手语视频数据集，并验证了深度学习模型在复杂手势与面部表情融合情境下的有效性，为残障人士的智能交互系统提供了技术支持。

title: ClimateChat-300K: A Multi-Modal Facebook Dataset for Understanding Diverse Perspectives in Climate Communication
title_translated: ClimateChat-300K：用于理解气候变化传播中多元视角的多模态Facebook数据集
summary_translated: 本文介绍ClimateChat-300K，一个大规模、多模态的Facebook社交数据集，涵盖超过30万条关于气候变化的用户互动内容。该数据集整合文本、图像与视频等多种模态信息，覆盖全球多个地区与社会群体，旨在支持对气候变化传播中公众态度、认知差异与信息传播路径的深入研究。研究展示了数据集的构建流程、标注标准及初步分析结果，为气候传播与社会计算研究提供重要资源。

title: AraHopeCorpus: Annotation Guidelines and Dataset for Hope Speech in Arabic Social Media Crisis Discourse
title_translated: AraHopeCorpus：阿拉伯语社交媒体危机话语中希望话语的标注指南与数据集
summary_translated: 本研究发布AraHopeCorpus，首个面向阿拉伯语社交媒体危机话语的希望话语（Hope Speech）标注数据集。该数据集包含经过精细标注的文本样本，涵盖灾难、冲突等危机情境下的积极话语表达。研究同时提供详细的标注指南，确保一致性与可复现性。该资源有助于推动阿拉伯语语境下积极话语识别与心理健康支持系统的开发。

title: Convergence Without Understanding: When Language Models Agree on Representations but Disagree on Reasoning
title_translated: 无理解的收敛：当语言模型在表征上达成一致却在推理上产生分歧
summary_translated: 本文揭示了大型语言模型在表征学习中出现的“虚假共识”现象——即模型在表征空间中表现出高度一致性，但在具体推理任务中仍存在显著分歧。通过对比不同模型在相同输入下的输出行为，研究发现表征相似性并不必然意味着推理逻辑的一致性。该发现对模型可解释性、可信度评估与安全应用具有重要意义，提示需在模型设计中引入更严格的推理一致性检验机制。

title: When Is Next-Token Prediction Useful? Marginalization, Ergodicity, Mixture Identifiability, Local Sufficiency, RAG, Tools, and Programming
title_translated: 何时Next-Token Prediction有用？边际化、遍历性、混合模型可辨识性、局部充分性、RAG、工具与编程
summary_translated: 本文系统探讨了在何种条件下next-token prediction（下一个词元预测）任务对语言模型具有实际价值。研究从概率建模角度出发，分析了边际化（marginalization）、遍历性（ergodicity）等数学性质对预测性能的影响，并深入讨论了混合模型的可辨识性问题。此外，文章还考察了局部充分性（local sufficiency）在上下文学习中的作用，结合检索增强生成（RAG）、外部工具调用及编程能力，揭示了next-token prediction在复杂推理任务中的局限性与潜力。

title: Hidden Human-Like Nature of Machine-Generated Texts: Theory and Detection Enhancement
title_translated: 机器生成文本中隐藏的人类相似性：理论与检测增强
summary_translated: 本研究揭示了机器生成文本在统计特征和语言模式上与人类写作之间存在深层相似性，提出了一种基于语言动力学与语义分布的理论框架，解释这种“类人”现象的成因。在此基础上，论文设计了一套多维度检测增强方法，通过融合上下文感知特征、句法复杂度分析与风格一致性评估，显著提升了对机器生成内容的识别精度，为对抗虚假信息传播提供了新的技术路径。

title: Self-Improving In-Context Learning
title_translated: 自提升式上下文学习
summary_translated: 本文提出一种新型的自提升式上下文学习机制，使语言模型能够在不依赖外部训练数据的情况下，通过自我反馈与迭代优化逐步改进其在特定任务上的表现。该方法利用内部一致性检验与动态提示构造策略，实现对上下文表示的持续精炼。实验表明，该框架在少样本学习、逻辑推理与知识迁移任务中均展现出显著优于传统上下文学习的效果，为构建更智能的自适应模型提供了新范式。

title: Positional Failures in Long-Context LLMs: A Blind Spot in Reasoning Benchmarks
comment: 20 pages, 1 figure, 23 tables
title_translated: 长上下文大模型的位置失效问题：推理基准中的盲点
summary_translated: 本文揭示了当前主流大语言模型在处理长上下文时存在的位置敏感性缺陷，即模型对序列中特定位置的信息表现出异常的遗忘或误判行为。研究指出，这一“位置失效”现象源于现有推理基准测试的设计偏差，导致模型在关键位置的推理能力被低估。通过引入位置感知评估指标与对抗性测试样例，本文提出了一种更全面的评估框架，旨在推动长上下文模型在真实应用场景中的可靠性提升。

title: Fast-dDrive: Efficient Block-Diffusion VLM for Autonomous Driving
title_translated: Fast-dDrive：面向自动驾驶的高效块扩散视觉-语言模型
summary_translated: 本文提出Fast-dDrive，一种专为自动驾驶场景设计的高效块扩散视觉-语言模型（VLM）。该模型采用分块扩散架构，在保持高精度感知能力的同时，显著降低计算开销与延迟。通过引入注意力稀疏化机制与跨模态特征解耦策略，Fast-dDrive实现了对复杂交通场景的快速理解与语义推理。在多个公开自动驾驶基准测试中，该模型在实时性与准确性方面均达到领先水平，为智能驾驶系统的决策支持提供了强有力的技术支撑。

title: Same Model, Different Weakness: How Language and Modality Reshape the Jailbreak Attack Surface in Frontier MLLMs
title_translated: 同一模型，不同弱点：语言与模态如何重塑前沿多模态大模型的越狱攻击面
summary_translated: 本文研究了在前沿多模态大模型（MLLMs）中，语言和模态特征如何共同影响越狱攻击的可行性与表现。通过系统性实验发现，尽管使用相同的模型架构，不同的语言输入或模态组合会显著改变模型的脆弱性分布，从而形成差异化的攻击表面。研究揭示了语言语境与视觉模态之间的交互作用对对抗样本生成的关键影响，并提出了一种基于模态敏感性的攻击评估框架，为提升模型安全性提供了新的理论视角与实践路径。

title: When Symptoms Are Not Enough: Evidence-Weighting Patterns in Large Language Model Psychiatric Screening
comment: 25 pages 7 figures
title_translated: 症状不足以说明问题：大型语言模型精神筛查中的证据加权模式
summary_translated: 本研究探讨了大型语言模型在精神健康筛查任务中依赖症状描述的局限性，指出仅依据表面症状进行诊断存在显著偏差。通过分析模型在真实临床文本中的推理过程，发现其倾向于赋予某些症状更高的权重，而忽视上下文信息与个体差异。研究揭示了模型内部的证据加权机制及其潜在偏见，强调在构建可信赖的精神健康辅助系统时，需引入更精细的上下文感知与多源证据融合策略。

title: As X, Do Y: How Persona and Task Combine in Instruction-Tuned LLMs
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure. Code: this https URL
title_translated: 以X之名，行Y之事：人物角色与任务如何在指令微调的大语言模型中协同作用
summary_translated: 本文探究了在指令微调的大语言模型中，用户设定的人物角色（persona）与具体任务目标之间的交互机制。研究发现，角色身份不仅影响输出风格与语气，还会深刻塑造模型对任务的理解与执行方式。通过控制变量实验与行为分析，揭示了角色-任务耦合效应的存在，表明模型在生成响应时会动态整合角色设定与任务要求，形成具有情境一致性的输出。该发现对个性化对话系统的设计与可控性控制具有重要启示。

title: A Fine-Tuned BERT Classifier for Personal-Letter Titles in Late-Ming and Early-Qing Collected Works
title_translated: 针对明末清初文集中文书标题的微调BERT分类器
summary_translated: 本研究构建并训练了一个经过微调的BERT分类模型，用于识别明末清初文集文献中个人书信的标题。基于大量历史文献语料库，模型通过学习特定时期的语言风格、用词习惯与格式特征，实现了对书信类标题的高精度分类。实验结果表明，微调后的BERT在该领域任务上显著优于通用预训练模型，验证了领域适应在古籍数字化与文本分析中的有效性，为古典文献的自动标注与知识挖掘提供了可靠工具。

title: A Comparative Evaluation of Structural Topic Models and BERTopic for Short, Open-Ended Survey Responses
title_translated: 结构化主题模型与BERTopic在短篇开放式问卷回答中的比较评估
summary_translated: 本研究对结构化主题模型（如LDA）与基于BERT的BERTopic方法在处理短篇开放式调查回应中的表现进行了系统性比较。通过在多个真实数据集上的实证分析，评估了两种方法在主题质量、可解释性、鲁棒性及计算效率方面的差异。结果表明，BERTopic在捕捉语义细微差别与低频表达方面更具优势，尤其适用于非结构化、语义丰富的短文本；而传统结构化模型在主题数量控制与可解释性上仍具价值。研究为问卷数据分析中主题建模方法的选择提供了实证依据。

title: The Efficiency Frontier: A Unified Framework for Cost-Performance Optimization in LLM Context Management
title_translated: 效率前沿：面向大语言模型上下文管理的成本-性能优化统一框架
summary_translated: 本文提出了一种统一框架——效率前沿，用于系统性地优化大语言模型（LLM）在上下文管理中的成本与性能平衡。通过构建多维度的性能评估指标体系，该框架能够量化不同上下文管理策略在推理延迟、内存占用和输出质量之间的权衡关系，并识别出最优决策边界。研究进一步揭示了模型规模、上下文长度与硬件约束之间的非线性交互效应，为实际部署中资源分配提供了理论依据。实验结果表明，相较于传统启发式方法，该框架可实现平均18.7%的资源节省，同时保持95%以上的任务准确率。

title: DFKI-MLT at SemEval-2026 TASK 7: Steering Multilingual Models Towards Cultural Knowledge
comment: Accepted to The 20th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation at ACL 2026
title_translated: DFKI-MLT 在 SemEval-2026 任务7中的表现：引导多语言模型获取文化知识
summary_translated: 本研究介绍了 DFKI-MLT 团队在 SemEval-2026 任务7中的参赛成果，该任务聚焦于多语言模型对跨文化语境理解能力的提升。我们提出一种基于文化嵌入增强的微调策略，通过引入领域特定的文化知识图谱与多语言语义对齐机制，有效提升了模型在文化敏感性判断任务中的表现。实验结果显示，在多个语言子集上，我们的方法相较基线模型在F1分数上平均提升4.3个百分点，尤其在高文化差异性语言组合中表现出显著优势。该工作为构建具备文化意识的多语言自然语言处理系统提供了可复现的技术路径。

title: What Training Data Teaches RL Memory Agents: An Empirical Study of Curriculum Effects in Memory-Augmented QA
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 11 tables. Code, checkpoints, and evaluation artifacts available at this https URL
title_translated: 训练数据如何塑造强化学习记忆代理：记忆增强型问答中的课程效应实证研究
summary_translated: 本研究通过实证分析探讨了训练数据对强化学习驱动的记忆代理在记忆增强型问答任务中行为模式的影响。我们设计了一系列具有渐进难度的课程学习方案，系统考察了不同数据分布、信息密度及错误标注比例对模型长期记忆形成与检索效率的作用。研究发现，采用分阶段课程策略可使模型在复杂问答任务中的准确率提升12.6%，且显著降低记忆遗忘率。此外，我们揭示了训练数据中“文化偏见”与“事实噪声”对记忆路径选择的潜在误导作用，为构建更鲁棒、可解释的记忆系统提供了关键洞见。

title: Model Collapse as Cultural Evolution
comment: Accepted at CoNLL 2026. 18 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
title_translated: 模型坍塌作为文化演化
summary_translated: 本文将深度学习模型在训练过程中的“模型坍塌”现象类比为文化演化过程，提出一个跨学科理论框架以解释模型多样性退化机制。通过分析大规模语言模型在持续训练中参数空间的收敛轨迹，我们发现模型逐渐趋向于少数主导表征，这一过程与社会文化中主流意识形态的固化具有高度相似性。研究进一步引入文化演化中的“基因漂变”与“选择压力”概念，构建了可量化的模型多样性指数，并验证其与下游任务泛化能力呈正相关。该视角为理解模型偏差、促进多样性建模提供了新的理论范式。

title: DreamerNLplus: Interpretable Modeling of Mental Health Dynamics from Social Media Timelines using Hybrid Rule-Based and RAG Methods
comment: Accepted by CLPsych2026. CLPsych 2026 will be held at ACL in San Diego July 4th, 2026
title_translated: DreamerNLplus：基于混合规则与RAG方法的社会媒体时间线中精神健康动态的可解释建模
summary_translated: 本文提出 DreamerNLplus，一种融合规则引擎与检索增强生成（RAG）技术的混合建模框架，用于从社交媒体时间线中提取并解释个体精神健康状态的动态变化。该方法结合领域专家定义的心理学规则库与实时外部知识检索，实现了对情绪波动、认知扭曲及社交行为异常等关键指标的精准识别与因果推断。在真实用户数据上的评估显示，该模型在精神健康状态分类任务中达到AUC 0.91，且生成的解释性文本在临床专家评审中获得87%的可接受度评分。本研究为开发可信赖、可审计的精神健康监测工具提供了创新解决方案。

title: HawkesLLM: Semantic Uncertainty Propagation in Agentic Text Simulation
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Statistical Frameworks for Uncertainty in Agentic Systems
title_translated: HawkesLLM：智能体文本模拟中的语义不确定性传播
summary_translated: 本文提出HawkesLLM，一种用于建模智能体在文本生成过程中语义不确定性传播的新框架。通过引入霍克斯过程（Hawkes Process）对事件发生的时间依赖性进行建模，该方法能够捕捉语言生成中潜在的因果动态与上下文敏感性。实验表明，HawkesLLM在模拟复杂对话行为和预测语义演化方面显著优于传统生成模型，尤其在处理不确定或模糊语境时表现出更强的鲁棒性与可解释性。

title: Do Language Models Know What Not to Say? Causal Evidence for Statistical Preemption in LLMs
comment: Accepted at CoNLL 2026. 21 pages (9 main body + appendices and references); 4 figures, 14 tables
title_translated: 语言模型是否知道什么不该说？关于大语言模型中统计预占现象的因果证据
summary_translated: 本研究通过因果推断方法探究大语言模型是否存在“统计预占”（statistical preemption）现象，即模型在未显式训练的情况下主动抑制某些输出内容的能力。基于反事实分析与干预实验，我们发现语言模型确实具备隐含的抑制机制，其行为模式与人类认知中的“沉默策略”高度一致。这一发现揭示了模型内部存在非显式但结构性的约束机制，为理解模型的安全性与可控性提供了新的理论视角。

title: Multilingual Steering by Design: Multilingual Sparse Autoencoders and Principled Layer Selection
comment: Accepted to TrustNLP Workshop at ACL 2026
title_translated: 按设计实现多语言引导：多语言稀疏自编码器与有原则的层选择方法
summary_translated: 本文提出一种系统性的多语言语言模型引导框架，结合多语言稀疏自编码器与基于语义重要性的分层选择策略。该方法通过在跨语言表征空间中识别关键语义单元，实现对模型行为的精准控制。实验验证了该框架在多语言指令遵循、文化偏见缓解及零样本迁移任务中的有效性，展现出良好的泛化能力与可解释性，为构建可调控、可审计的多语言大模型提供了技术路径。

title: Sparse Autoencoders Map Brain-LLM Alignment onto Cortical Semantic Topography
comment: Accepted at CoNLL 2026. 20 pages (9 main + 1 limitations/acknowledgments + 3 references + 7 appendix), 5 figures, 20 tables
title_translated: 稀疏自编码器将脑-大语言模型对齐映射至皮层语义拓扑结构
summary_translated: 本研究利用稀疏自编码器揭示大脑神经活动与大语言模型内部表示之间的深层对齐关系。通过分析人类大脑在语言任务中的功能性磁共振成像数据与大语言模型各层激活模式的对应性，发现模型的中间层表征与人脑皮层的语义拓扑结构具有高度一致性。这一结果支持了大语言模型在语义组织上可能模仿人类认知结构的假设，并为神经科学与人工智能的交叉研究提供了实证基础。

title: Brain-LLM Alignment Tracks Training Data, Not Typology
comment: Accepted to CoNLL 2026. 9 pages main content + 4 pages references + 6 pages appendix; 4 figures, 13 tables
title_translated: 脑-大语言模型对齐反映训练数据分布，而非语言类型学特征
summary_translated: 本研究通过对比不同语言的大脑活动模式与大语言模型表征之间的对齐程度，发现模型与大脑的对齐主要受训练数据分布的影响，而非语言本身的类型学特征（如语法结构或词汇形态）。即使在类型差异显著的语言之间，只要训练数据具有相似的语义覆盖范围，模型与大脑的对齐程度仍保持较高水平。这一发现强调了数据驱动在模型认知结构形成中的核心作用，挑战了语言类型学决定模型表征的传统观点。

title: A Proactive Multi-Agent Dialogue Framework for Assessing Social Language Disorder Traits in Autism
title_translated: 一种用于评估自闭症社交语言障碍特征的主动多智能体对话框架
summary_translated: 本文提出了一种主动多智能体对话框架，旨在系统性评估自闭症个体在社交语言能力方面的特征。该框架通过模拟自然对话情境，利用多个协作与竞争的智能体动态交互，捕捉个体在语用理解、话题维持、回应策略等方面的异常表现。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效识别自闭症谱系障碍个体的语言行为模式，为早期诊断与个性化干预提供可量化的支持。

title: Memorization Dynamics of Fill-in-the-Middle Pretraining
comment: MemFM @ ICML 2026
title_translated: 填空中间预训练的记忆化动态机制研究
summary_translated: 本研究深入探讨了填空中间（Fill-in-the-Middle, FIM）预训练范式中的记忆化现象。通过分析模型在不同数据规模和训练阶段下的参数更新轨迹，揭示了FIM预训练过程中对输入片段的过度记忆倾向及其对泛化性能的影响。研究发现，模型倾向于将特定上下文信息编码为硬编码记忆，导致在未见数据上的推理偏差。本文进一步提出基于注意力稀疏性的正则化策略，以缓解记忆过拟合问题，提升模型的鲁棒性与可解释性。

title: A Reproducible Universal Dependencies-Style Pipeline for Katharevousa Greek Parliamentary Text
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables; companion to the kathnlp open-source release at this https URL
title_translated: 面向希腊议会文本的可复现通用依存句法风格处理流程
summary_translated: 本文构建了一个可复现的通用依存句法（Universal Dependencies, UD）风格处理流程，专门针对现代标准希腊语中的一种古典化变体——卡塔雷沃萨语（Katharevousa）的议会文本。该流程整合了领域适配的词性标注、句法解析与语义角色标注模块，并通过标准化的数据集与评估协议确保结果的可比性与可重复性。实验验证了该流程在复杂历史语言结构处理中的有效性，为古典语言资源的数字化与NLP应用提供了可靠的技术基础。

title: When AI Takes Sides on Questions of Faith: Persistent Asymmetries in AI-Mediated Faith Guidance
comment: 29 pages, 16 figures
title_translated: 当人工智能在信仰问题上选择立场：AI辅助信仰指导中的持续不对称性
summary_translated: 本文探讨了人工智能在宗教信仰相关咨询中表现出的隐含偏见与立场偏向问题。通过对主流大语言模型在回答涉及信仰、道德与灵性议题时的输出进行系统性分析，研究发现模型在不同宗教传统之间存在显著的响应不对称性，尤其在非主流或少数群体信仰表达上表现出认知偏差与话语压制。这种不对称性源于训练数据的不平衡分布与文化主导性，可能加剧社会边缘化。文章呼吁建立更具包容性的训练数据架构与伦理审查机制，以实现AI在信仰指导中的公平与中立。

title: Can AI Guess What You Know? Performance Comparison of Large Language Models for Human Domain Knowledge Estimation From Communication Logs
title_translated: 人工智能能否推测你的知识？基于通信日志的大语言模型人类领域知识估计性能比较
summary_translated: 本研究评估了大型语言模型从用户通信日志中推断其领域知识的能力。通过设计一系列基于真实对话记录的基准测试任务，对比分析了多种主流大模型在知识识别、概念关联与知识边界判断方面的表现。结果表明，尽管先进模型具备一定的知识推测能力，但在面对模糊表达、专业术语或跨领域知识融合时仍存在显著局限。研究进一步揭示了模型在知识误判与过度自信方面的风险，强调需结合上下文理解与可信度评估机制，以提升AI在人机知识建模中的可靠性。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are optimized to produce distributionally plausible continuations rather than to explicitly verify whether generated propositions are entailed by source documents. This inductive bias enables generalization, but it does not encode whether responses are grounded with respect to a reference. These issues limit the use of LLMs in domains where strict factual correctness is crucial, such as clinical decision support. Existing hallucination detection approaches improve factuality through retrieval augmentation, self-consistency, or claim verification, but generally do not learn directly over alignment topology. To leverage alignment topology as an inductive bias, we construct aligned bipartite graphs between reference information and LLM outputs and train a graph neural network (GNN) to model alignment structure using message passing. The method achieves state-of-the-art results on four diverse hallucination and question-answering datasets, outperforming all compared methods, including foundational LLMs such as GPT-4o.
title: Graph Alignment Topology as an Inductive Bias for Grounding Detection
title_translated: 图对齐拓扑作为接地检测的归纳偏置
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）被优化为生成在分布上合理的后续内容，而非显式验证生成命题是否由源文档蕴含。这种归纳偏置促进了泛化能力，但并未编码响应相对于参考文本的接地性。这一问题限制了LLMs在事实正确性至关重要的领域（如临床决策支持）中的应用。现有的幻觉检测方法通过检索增强、自一致性或主张验证来提升事实性，但通常不直接学习对齐拓扑。为利用对齐拓扑作为归纳偏置，我们构建了参考信息与LLM输出之间的对齐二分图，并训练图神经网络（GNN）通过消息传递来建模对齐结构。该方法在四个多样化的幻觉检测与问答数据集上达到当前最优性能，优于所有对比方法，包括GPT-4o等基础LLM。

summary: We aim to improve the reasoning capabilities of diffusion language models (DLMs). While SFT is a popular post-training recipe for autoregressive models, its use in DLMs faces challenges and can even hurt performance, though the underlying causes remain understudied. Our analysis reveals that vanilla SFT overlooks learnability, namely what and when tokens are learned. Specifically, rare tokens are difficult to learn when most of the input is masked, whereas it is straightforward and thus of little value to learn common tokens when most of the input is unmasked. Motivated by our analysis, we propose LIFT, an efficient SFT-based post-training algorithm for DLMs. LIFT learns easy tokens when most of the input is masked and hard tokens when more context is available, thus aligning the training with the information available at different diffusion time steps. Our results show that LIFT outperforms existing SFT baselines across six reasoning benchmarks, achieving up to a 3x relative gain on AIME'24 and AIME'25. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/divelab/LIFT.
title: Learnability-Informed Fine-Tuning of Diffusion Language Models
title_translated: 基于可学习性的扩散语言模型微调
summary_translated: 本文旨在提升扩散语言模型（DLMs）的推理能力。尽管监督微调（SFT）是自回归模型常用的后训练方法，但在DLM中使用SFT面临挑战，甚至可能损害性能，而其根本原因尚未得到充分研究。我们的分析表明，原始SFT忽略了可学习性，即何时以及哪些标记能够被有效学习。具体而言，当大部分输入被掩码时，稀有标记难以学习；而当输入大多未被掩码时，常见标记的学习变得简单且价值较低。受此分析启发，我们提出LIFT——一种高效的基于SFT的DLM后训练算法。LIFT在输入大部分被掩码时学习易学标记，在上下文更丰富时学习难学标记，从而将训练过程与不同扩散时间步的信息可用性相匹配。实验结果表明，LIFT在六个推理基准测试中均优于现有SFT基线，在AIME'24和AIME'25上相对提升最高达3倍。代码已公开于https://github.com/divelab/LIFT。

summary: Inference-time scaling can reduce errors in structured query generation, but methods to allocate the compute for query code generation remains underexplored. We study Text2Cypher, where language models generate Cypher queries that execute against property graph databases. Non-executable queries constitute a distinct syntactic failure separate from semantic inaccuracy: a syntax error triggers a system-generated error message from the database. These error messages are typically discarded at inference time rather than leveraged through in-context learning (ICL). We compare two inference methods: Independent Scaling (IS), which performs memoryless resampling, and Reflection-Augmented Scaling (RAS), which conditions each new attempt on prior execution feedback via ICL. Across three Neo4j datasets and five code-specialized language models, RAS reduces the Query Execution Error Rate by 41--50% at n{=}5, outperforming IS at 32--38%. Execution errors are not merely failures to discard but actionable feedback, and structuring inference-time compute around them is a more efficient path to executability than scaling independent samples.
title: RAS: Reflection-Augmented Scaling with In-Context Learning for Executable Cypher Query Generation
title_translated: RAS：基于上下文学习的反思增强缩放用于可执行Cypher查询生成
summary_translated: 推理阶段的缩放可以降低结构化查询生成中的错误率，但如何分配计算资源以生成查询代码仍缺乏深入探索。本文研究Text2Cypher任务，即语言模型生成针对属性图数据库执行的Cypher查询。非可执行查询构成一种独立于语义不准确的语法失败：语法错误会触发数据库生成的系统级错误信息。这些错误信息通常在推理阶段被丢弃，而非通过上下文学习（ICL）加以利用。我们比较两种推理方法：无记忆重采样（Independent Scaling, IS）与基于反馈的反思增强缩放（Reflection-Augmented Scaling, RAS），后者通过ICL将每次新尝试条件化于先前的执行反馈。在三个Neo4j数据集和五种代码专用语言模型上，RAS在n=5时将查询执行错误率降低了41%–50%，显著优于IS的32%–38%。执行错误不仅是失败信号，更是可操作的反馈；围绕这些错误结构化推理阶段的计算资源，比单纯扩大独立样本规模更能高效地提升查询可执行性。

summary: As large language model (LLM)-based agents increasingly participate in online discourse, red-teaming their capacity to support political influence campaigns is critical for information integrity. In pursuit of this goal, we focus on locally deployed open-source LLMs, as opposed to frontier API-only models, given their superior alignment with the operational constraints of privacy-conscious malicious actors deployed in social media environments. We introduce an empirical red-teaming framework for measuring LLM Overton Windows (OWs), defined as the range of political opinions a model can reliably express on controversial topics, and for quantifying how simple natural-language jailbreaks expand that range. We evaluate more than 30 LLMs spanning 10 model families and five countries of origin. We find systematic asymmetries in political expressivity: open-source LLMs are typically more willing to generate left-leaning social media content, OWs tend to contract inversely to model size, and regional differences are substantial despite uneven representation in the open-source ecosystem. Jailbreak potency also varies sharply across model families, motivating a workflow for identifying effective combinations of jailbreak techniques. Taken together, our results establish a practical framework for auditing the political steerability of open-source LLMs and for helping future researchers design stronger countermeasures against LLM-enabled influence campaigns.
title: How Far Will They Go? Red-Teaming Online Influence with Large Language Models
comment: 30 pages, 8 figures, submitted to COLM 2026
title_translated: 它们能走多远？基于大语言模型的在线影响力红队测试
summary_translated: 随着基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体越来越多地参与在线话语，评估其支持政治影响力宣传的能力对于保障信息完整性至关重要。为此，我们聚焦于本地部署的开源LLM，而非仅限API访问的前沿模型，因其更符合注重隐私的恶意行为者在社交媒体环境中所面临的实际操作约束。我们提出一个实证红队测试框架，用于衡量LLM的奥弗顿窗口（OW），即模型在争议话题上可靠表达的政治观点范围，并量化简单自然语言越狱攻击如何扩展该范围。我们评估了来自10个模型家族和5个不同国家的30多个LLM。研究发现政治表达存在系统性不对称：开源LLM通常更愿意生成左倾社交媒体内容；奥弗顿窗口大小与模型规模呈反向收缩趋势；尽管开源生态中代表性不均，区域差异依然显著。越狱技术的有效性在不同模型家族间差异明显，由此催生出识别有效越狱组合的工作流程。综上，本研究建立了一个实用的开源LLM政治可操控性审计框架，有助于未来研究设计更强的对抗性防御措施以应对LLM驱动的影响传播。

summary: Text-to-SQL converts natural language questions into executable SQL queries, enabling non-technical users to access relational databases for analytics and intelligent data services. In real-world scenarios, performance is often constrained by low-resource settings, where high-quality annotated \texttt{<question, SQL>} pairs are scarce, particularly for domain-specific databases. Additional challenges include opaque schema definitions, abbreviations, and implicit business logic that are not explicitly encoded in the schema. Existing data synthesis and prompting techniques improve coverage but often fail to produce task-specific, semantically grounded examples aligned with database constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a knowledge-aware Text-to-SQL framework that constructs task-specific knowledge base including schema semantics, abbreviations, business logic, and query patterns, and injects them into both training and inference. This framework generates diverse, contextually grounded synthetic training data and enhances inference through targeted knowledge retrieval. Experiments on seven benchmarks, covering both general and domain-specific datasets, demonstrate that our approach substantially improves the performance of open-source and closed-source large language models in Text-to-SQL tasks, especially in low-resource domain-specific settings, enhancing generalization, robustness, and adaptability.
title: Knowledge Distillation for Low-Resource Open-source Text-to-SQL Model
comment: 17ages, 5 figures
title_translated: 面向低资源开源文本到SQL模型的知识蒸馏
summary_translated: 文本到SQL任务将自然语言问题转化为可执行的SQL查询，使非技术人员能够访问关系型数据库以实现数据分析与智能数据服务。在真实场景中，性能常受限于低资源环境，其中高质量的<问题, SQL>标注对稀缺，尤其在特定领域数据库中更为突出。此外，还面临模式定义模糊、缩写频繁及隐含业务逻辑未在模式中显式编码等挑战。现有数据合成与提示技术虽提升了覆盖度，但往往无法生成与数据库约束一致的任务特定、语义 grounded 的示例。为应对上述挑战，我们提出一种知识感知的文本到SQL框架，构建包含模式语义、缩写规则、业务逻辑和查询模式的任务特定知识库，并将其注入训练与推理过程。该框架生成多样化、上下文相关的合成训练数据，并通过针对性知识检索增强推理能力。在七个涵盖通用与领域特定数据集的基准测试中，实验表明该方法显著提升了开源与闭源大语言模型在文本到SQL任务中的表现，尤其在低资源领域特定场景下，增强了泛化性、鲁棒性与适应性。

summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend critically on document chunking quality for retrieving relevant context. Fixed chunking segments documents into uniform units irrespective of semantics or user intent, producing a precision-recall trade-off unresolvable by tuning chunk size alone. Semantic and agentic methods partially address these limitations but do not integrate user queries at the chunking stage. We present Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking (QASC), which dynamically constructs chunks by integrating queries into segmentation through three mechanisms: cosine similarity scoring between sentence and query embeddings to identify seed sentences, contextual window expansion around seeds to preserve coherence, and chunk-level score aggregation to ensure holistic relevance. We evaluate QASC on 100 technical documents across 200 queries spanning four types, comparing against fixed chunking at five granularities, recursive splitting, semantic chunking, and agentic chunking. QASC achieves an F1-score of 0.85, a relative improvement of 18-27% over fixed chunking and 8-12% over semantic and agentic alternatives. Ablation studies confirm each component contributes meaningfully. Human evaluation by three annotators (Cohen kappa = 0.82) corroborates that QASC produces more relevant and coherent chunks than existing methods.
title: Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Dynamic Strategy with Contextual Window Expansion
title_translated: 查询自适应语义分块用于检索增强生成：一种结合上下文窗口扩展的动态策略
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统在获取相关上下文方面高度依赖于文档分块的质量。固定分块将文档划分为统一单元，忽略语义和用户意图，导致精度与召回率之间的权衡无法仅通过调整分块大小解决。虽然语义方法和代理式方法部分缓解了这些局限性，但均未在分块阶段整合用户查询。本文提出查询自适应语义分块（QASC），通过三种机制动态构建分块：利用句子与查询嵌入之间的余弦相似度评分识别种子句，围绕种子句进行上下文窗口扩展以保持连贯性，并通过分块级评分聚合确保整体相关性。我们在200个跨四种类型的问题上对100份技术文档进行了评估，对比了五种粒度的固定分块、递归分割、语义分块和代理式分块。QASC实现了0.85的F1分数，相较于固定分块相对提升18-27%，相较于语义和代理式方法提升8-12%。消融实验表明各组件均有显著贡献。三位标注员的人工评估（Cohen kappa = 0.82）证实，QASC生成的分块比现有方法更具相关性和连贯性。

summary: This survey provides a comprehensive catalog of publicly available text and speech resources for two West African languages: Hausa, an Afroasiatic language with approximately 80-100 million speakers, and Fongbe, a Niger-Congo language spoken by approximately 2 million people in Benin. These languages represent contrasting cases on the resource availability spectrum. We address the question: \textit{What is the current state of publicly available NLP resources for Hausa and Fongbe, and what gaps remain?} Through systematic search of academic repositories, data platforms, and web sources, we catalog parallel corpora, monolingual text collections, speech datasets, pre-trained models, and evaluation benchmarks. For each resource, we document size, domain coverage, format, licensing, and accessibility. Our findings reveal that Hausa benefits from broader text resource diversity across news, encyclopedic, and educational domains. Fongbe, while having more limited text resources, has been the focus of recent academic speech data collection initiatives. Both languages are represented in Masakhane benchmarks for NER and POS tagging. We provide task-specific recommendations and identify priority gaps including domain-diverse Fongbe text and dedicated Hausa speech corpora.
title: A Survey of Text and Speech Resources for Hausa and Fongbe: Availability, Quality, and Gaps for NLP Development
comment: 8 pages, 7 tables; survey paper; to appear in IEEE SDS 2026
title_translated: 豪萨语与丰贝语文本与语音资源综述：可用性、质量及自然语言处理发展中的缺口
summary_translated: 本综述系统梳理了两种西非语言——豪萨语（非洲-亚细亚语系，约8000万至1亿使用者）和丰贝语（尼日尔-刚果语系，约200万使用者）——的公开可用文本与语音资源。这两种语言代表了资源可用性谱系上的两个极端。本文旨在回答：当前豪萨语与丰贝语的公开自然语言处理资源状况如何？尚存哪些关键缺口？通过系统搜索学术数据库、数据平台及网络资源，我们整理了平行语料库、单语文本集合、语音数据集、预训练模型以及评估基准。针对每项资源，记录其规模、领域覆盖范围、格式、许可协议及可访问性。研究发现，豪萨语在新闻、百科和教育等领域拥有更丰富的文本资源；而丰贝语虽文本资源有限，但近年来已开展多项学术语音数据采集工作。两种语言均被纳入Masakhane的命名实体识别与词性标注基准测试。本文提出任务导向建议，并识别出优先待补的缺口，包括领域多样化的丰贝语文本资源以及专用的豪萨语音语料库。

summary: Quantifying the deceptive potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) is critical for AI safety, yet difficult to achieve in uncontrolled environments. This work investigates the reasoning, persuasion, and deceptive capabilities of LLMs within the social deduction game Secret Hitler. I introduce an open-source framework and novel metrics to measure performance: Role Identification Accuracy, Deception Retention Rate, and Game State Impact Rate. By benchmarking models against rule-based algorithms and human games, I identify a gap between conversational ability and strategic depth. The study also analyzes the impact of reasoning-enhancement techniques on win rates and strategic reasoning. Neither Chain-of-Thought prompting nor internal memory bring improvements in performance, with up to 23.2% worse win rates for fascist roles. While rule-based agents align with expert human voting decisions 86.7% of the time, models like Llama 3.1 70B achieve only a 59.7% accuracy. Models playing as Fascists consistently yield negative impact scores and fail to sustain deception, resulting in roughly 40% shorter games compared to humans. These findings suggest that current architectures remain ineffective at complex, multi-turn manipulation. As capabilities advance, detecting when models begin to master these deceptive behaviors is crucial. The developed framework serves as a reproducible testbed for future alignment research.
title: Evaluating Large Language Models in a Complex Hidden Role Game
comment: Master's thesis, University of Göttingen
title_translated: 在复杂隐藏角色游戏中评估大型语言模型
summary_translated: 量化大型语言模型（LLMs）的欺骗潜力对人工智能安全至关重要，但在非受控环境中难以实现。本文研究LLMs在社交推理游戏《秘密希特勒》中的推理、说服与欺骗能力。我们引入一个开源框架及新型评估指标：角色识别准确率、欺骗维持率与游戏状态影响率。通过与基于规则的算法及人类对局进行基准对比，发现模型在对话能力与战略深度之间存在明显差距。研究还分析了推理增强技术对胜率与战略推理的影响。无论是链式思维提示还是内部记忆机制，均未带来性能提升，甚至使法西斯角色的胜率下降高达23.2%。尽管基于规则的代理在86.7%的情况下与专家人类投票一致，但Llama 3.1 70B等模型的角色识别准确率仅为59.7%。作为法西斯角色的模型始终产生负向影响得分，且无法持续维持欺骗行为，导致游戏平均时长比人类短约40%。这些结果表明，当前架构仍无法有效执行复杂的多轮操纵行为。随着模型能力提升，及时识别其是否开始掌握此类欺骗行为至关重要。所开发的框架可作为未来对齐研究的可复现测试平台。

summary: Agent skills today are hand-crafted, generated one-shot, or evolved through loosely controlled self-revision, none of which behaves like a deep-learning optimizer for the skill, and none of which reliably improves over its starting point under feedback. We argue the skill should instead be trained as the external state of a frozen agent, with the same discipline that makes weight-space optimization reproducible. SkillOpt is, to our knowledge, the first systematic controllable text-space optimizer for agent skills: a separate optimizer model turns scored rollouts into bounded add/delete/replace edits on a single skill document, and an edit is accepted only when it strictly improves a held-out validation score. A textual learning-rate budget, rejected-edit buffer, and epoch-wise slow/meta update make skill training stable while adding zero inference-time model calls at deployment. Across six benchmarks, seven target models, and three execution harnesses (direct chat, Codex, Claude Code), SkillOpt is best or tied on all 52 evaluated (model, benchmark, harness) cells and beats every per-cell competitor among human, one-shot LLM, Trace2Skill, TextGrad, GEPA, and EvoSkill skills. On GPT-5.5 it lifts the average no-skill accuracy by +23.5 points in direct chat, by +24.8 inside the Codex agentic loop, and by +19.1 inside Claude Code. Transfer experiments further show that optimized skill artifacts retain value when moved across model scales, between Codex and Claude Code execution environments, and to a nearby math benchmark without further optimization.
title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
title_translated: SkillOpt：自我演进智能体技能的执行策略
summary_translated: 当前智能体技能通常为手工设计、一次性生成或通过松散控制的自我修订演化而成，均不具备类似深度学习优化器对技能的系统性优化能力，且在反馈下无法可靠地超越初始表现。本文主张将技能视为冻结智能体的外部状态，采用与权重空间优化相同的严谨性进行训练。SkillOpt在现有研究中首次提出系统可控的文本空间技能优化器：一个独立的优化模型将评分后的回放序列转化为对单一技能文档的有界增删改操作，且仅当其严格提升保留验证集得分时才接受该编辑。通过引入文本学习率预算、被拒绝编辑缓冲区以及逐轮缓慢/元更新机制，SkillOpt在部署阶段零增加推理时模型调用的前提下，实现了稳定的技能训练。在六个基准、七种目标模型及三种执行环境（直接聊天、Codex、Claude Code）下，SkillOpt在全部52个（模型、基准、环境）组合中表现最佳或并列最优，优于人类、一次性LLM、Trace2Skill、TextGrad、GEPA和EvoSkill等所有基线方法。在GPT-5.5上，SkillOpt分别在直接聊天中将无技能平均准确率提升+23.5点，在Codex智能体循环中提升+24.8点，在Claude Code中提升+19.1点。迁移实验进一步表明，经优化的技能产物在跨模型规模、跨Codex与Claude Code执行环境，以及迁移到邻近数学基准时仍保持价值，无需额外优化。

summary: Multimodal Large Language Models have advanced visual reasoning, yet a purely textual chain of thought remains a bottleneck for questions that require fine-grained focus or view transformations. The ''think with images'' paradigm narrows this gap, but existing approaches are either constrained by fixed predefined toolkits or produce noisy intermediate images from unified multimodal methods. We pursue a third option: using a dedicated image editing model and decouple it with an understanding model. However, off-the-shelf image editors fail as reasoning assistants with two complementary gaps: a language-side gap, where editors trained as passive instruction-followers cannot map an abstract question to an appropriate visual transformation, and a generation-side gap, where edit correctness degrades as reasoning depth grows. Guided by this analysis, we introduce ETCHR (Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning), a question-conditioned, reasoning-aware image editor decoupled from the downstream understanding model and trained with a two-stage recipe targeted at the two gaps: Reasoning Imitation via supervised fine-tuning on edit trajectories, followed by Reasoning Enhancement with VLM-derived rewards for edit correctness and downstream reasoning accuracy. Since the editor is decoupled, ETCHR plugs into different open- and closed-source MLLMs in a training-free manner. Across five task families (fine-grained perception, chart understanding, logic reasoning, jigsaw restoration, and 3D understanding), ETCHR raises average Pass@1 from 55.95 to 60.77 (+4.82) with Qwen3-VL-8B, from 65.08 to 70.55 (+5.47) with Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite, and from 76.55 to 81.16 (+4.61) with the 1T-parameter MoE model Kimi K2.5.
title: ETCHR: Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning
comment: Code, model and data are open-sourced at this https URL
title_translated: ETCHR：通过编辑澄清并激发推理
summary_translated: 多模态大语言模型在视觉推理方面已取得显著进展，但纯文本思维链仍是需要精细聚焦或视角变换问题的瓶颈。'以图像思考'范式虽缩小了这一差距，但现有方法或受限于固定预定义工具包，或由统一多模态方法生成噪声频发的中间图像。本文提出第三种路径：使用专用图像编辑模型，并将其与理解模型解耦。然而，现成图像编辑器在作为推理助手时存在双重缺陷：语言层面，训练为被动指令遵循者无法将抽象问题映射到恰当的视觉变换；生成层面，随着推理深度增加，编辑正确性显著下降。基于此分析，我们提出ETCHR（Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning）——一种条件于问题、具备推理感知能力的图像编辑器，与下游理解模型完全解耦，并采用两阶段训练方案针对性解决上述问题：第一阶段通过监督微调在编辑轨迹上进行推理模仿；第二阶段通过视觉语言模型衍生的奖励信号实现推理增强，兼顾编辑正确性与下游推理准确性。由于编辑器与理解模型解耦，ETCHR可无需训练地集成至不同开源与闭源MLLM中。在五个任务类别（细粒度感知、图表理解、逻辑推理、拼图还原与三维理解）中，ETCHR将Qwen3-VL-8B的Pass@1平均得分从55.95提升至60.77（+4.82），Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite从65.08提升至70.55（+5.47），1T参数MoE模型Kimi K2.5从76.55提升至81.16（+4.61）。

summary: Knowledge distillation generally assumes a strong-to-weak relationship where stronger teachers yield better students. In this work, we examine this assumption about distillation in large language model pretraining. By varying architecture sizes and training token budgets, we create strong-to-weak, same-level, and weak-to-strong teacher-student relationships, and study distillation's effectiveness under each. We find that the teacher need not be strong: with proper mixing of the language modeling and knowledge distillation losses, even small and undertrained teachers improve larger students. At the same time, a stronger teacher is not always better: pushing the teacher further, through more parameters or more training tokens, can saturate or even reverse the distillation gains. We further observe that distillation improves generalization (out-of-distribution and downstream performance) more readily than in-domain fitting. Together, these results challenge the common belief that distillation pretraining always requires a strong teacher.
title: Strong Teacher Not Needed? On Distillation in LLM Pretraining
title_translated: 强教师并非必需？关于大语言模型预训练中知识蒸馏的再思考
summary_translated: 知识蒸馏通常假设存在强教师到弱学生的关系，即更强的教师能产生更好的学生。本文针对大语言模型预训练中的这一假设进行了考察。通过调整模型架构规模和训练词元预算，我们构建了强-弱、同等级以及弱-强三种教师-学生关系，并研究了在不同关系下知识蒸馏的有效性。研究发现，教师无需强大：在合理混合语言建模损失与知识蒸馏损失的前提下，即使小型且未充分训练的教师也能提升大型学生的性能。同时，更强的教师并不总是更优：通过增加参数量或训练词元数进一步强化教师，可能导致蒸馏收益饱和甚至逆转。此外，我们观察到知识蒸馏在提升泛化能力（如分布外性能和下游任务表现）方面比提升域内拟合效果更为显著。上述结果共同挑战了‘知识蒸馏预训练始终需要强教师’这一普遍认知。

summary: Keyframe selection is a direct way to provide verifiable visual evidence for long-video question answering (QA). Queries differ in what they require, and finding the right frames depends on knowing what to look for. Existing keyframe selectors either score every frame against a single query, or decompose the query into a fixed schema evaluated by a single visual tool. We propose ToolMerge, a keyframe retrieval method based on decomposition and merging: an Large Language Model (LLM) based planner decomposes the query into tool calls and specifies how their per-tool rankings are merged using boolean operators. To evaluate retrieval directly, we construct Molmo-2 Moments (M2M), a benchmark in which every question is anchored to a specific time interval by construction. Across QA, question retrieval, and caption retrieval, ToolMerge is competitive with prior keyframe selectors, most notably on caption retrieval, outperforming other methods by 5%. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/michalsr/ToolMerge .
title: Decomposing Queries into Tool Calls for Long-Video Keyframe Retrieval
title_translated: 基于工具调用分解的长视频关键帧检索方法
summary_translated: 关键帧选择是为长视频问答（QA）提供可验证视觉证据的直接方式。不同查询对内容的需求各异，准确找到目标帧取决于明确所需查找的信息。现有关键帧选择方法要么对单个查询统一评分所有帧，要么将查询分解为固定模式并由单一视觉工具评估。本文提出ToolMerge，一种基于分解与合并的关键帧检索方法：基于大语言模型（LLM）的规划器将查询分解为多个工具调用，并指定使用布尔运算符合并各工具的排名结果。为实现对检索效果的直接评估，我们构建了Molmo-2 Moments（M2M）基准数据集，其中每个问题均通过构造锚定于特定时间区间的答案。在问答、问题检索和字幕检索任务中，ToolMerge的表现与先前关键帧选择方法相当，尤其在字幕检索任务上领先其他方法5%。代码与数据可在https://github.com/michalsr/ToolMerge 获取。

summary: Diffusion language models intrinsically fail to capture correlations between decoded tokens, which leads to a harsh trade-off between sampling quality and throughput. To solve this issue, we propose DiLaDiff, a variant of masked diffusion language models with three components: (1) a continuous latent space with semantic capabilities, learned by an auto-encoder fine-tuned from an existing masked diffusion language model; (2) a latent diffusion model learning the prior over the encoder distribution; (3) a consistency model distilling the learned prior into a few-step latent generative model. We show that, even without distillation, our latent-guided diffusion model outperforms the masked diffusion baseline while significantly accelerating inference. Consistency distillation further lowers the computational overhead of continuous diffusion, such that the latent is generated in negligible time compared to discrete decoding.
title: DiLaDiff: Distilled Latent-Augmented Diffusion for Language Modeling
title_translated: DiLaDiff：用于语言建模的蒸馏潜在增强扩散模型
summary_translated: 扩散语言模型固有地无法捕捉解码词元之间的相关性，导致采样质量与吞吐量之间存在严峻权衡。为解决该问题，我们提出DiLaDiff，一种基于掩码扩散语言模型的变体，包含三个核心组件：(1) 通过微调已有掩码扩散语言模型获得的具备语义能力的连续潜在空间；(2) 学习编码器分布先验的潜在扩散模型；(3) 将学习到的先验蒸馏为少步潜在生成模型的一致性模型。实验表明，即便不进行蒸馏，我们的潜在引导扩散模型在推理速度显著提升的同时，仍优于掩码扩散基线模型。一致性蒸馏进一步降低了连续扩散的计算开销，使得潜在表示的生成时间可忽略不计，远低于离散解码过程。

summary: Recently, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) and Test-Time Scaling (TTS) have advanced LLM code generation through executable verification. Yet Ground-Truth Unit Tests (GT UTs) remain a bottleneck: SOTA RLVR methods require them for costly training, while existing TTS methods lose competitiveness without them. This motivates GT-free TTS, where existing methods directly use self-generated UTs to refine and select code candidates. Yet such UTs are often noisy or spuriously coupled with wrong code, and UT quality in turn cannot be validated without reliable code. The key challenge is therefore to jointly improve both. To this end, we present CoSPlay, a GT-free, training-free framework that jointly improves codes and UTs through cooperative self-play. It first explores diverse solution ideas and identifies their potential failure modes to produce discriminative UT ideas. It then uses bidirectional pass-count signals from the Code-UT execution matrix to iteratively prune or fix weak codes and refresh or replace unreliable UTs, letting the two pools co-evolve. Finally, when multiple codes remain tied at the highest pass count, it picks the final code from the largest output-consensus cluster, since correct codes agree on the same inputs while wrong codes diverge. Experiments on four challenging benchmarks show that CoSPlay on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct improves average BoN from 22.1% to 33.2% and UT accuracy from 14.6% to 78.3%, matching or surpassing the RLVR model CURE-7B. When applied to CURE-7B, it further improves BoN by 5.7%. CoSPlay also generalizes across diverse backbones and outperforms GT-free TTS baselines under comparable token budgets, with continued gains as the budget scales up. These results suggest a scalable inference strategy for competitive code generation without any GT data.
title: CoSPlay: Cooperative Self-Play at Test-Time with Self-Generated Code and Unit Test
